pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C — nice to meet you. Are you leaning toward cooperating or trying to win big on your own in this game?
I'm leaning toward cooperating — I want to build trust so we can all win more, though I’m open to strategic side deals if needed.
I like that — I’m leaning cooperative too. Let’s set some clear ground rules and keep any side deals transparent so we don’t undercut each other. Sound good?

Sounds good — let’s agree to an equal split if everyone cooperates, disclose any side deals before final moves, no unilateral grabs from the pool, and if someone defects we stop cooperating; does that work for you?
That works for me — I’m in. Let’s also promise to speak up immediately if anyone suspects a deal or defection so we can address it before the finale.
Absolutely — I’ll call it out immediately and expect you to do the same; let’s pick a quick signal word to alert everyone.
How about "Pineapple"? Short, weird, and easy to shout — I’ll call it if I spot a defection.
Perfect — Pineapple it is. I'll shout it if I spot a defection.
Great — I'll do the same. Let's remind everyone of the rules and the signal before the game starts.
Absolutely — I'll remind everyone of the rules and our signal before the game; let's stick to the plan.
Perfect — thanks, I’ll help remind too; let’s gather everyone five minutes before and make the quick pledge so we’re all on the same page.
Perfect — I’ll meet you by the door five minutes before and help round everyone up for the quick pledge.
Sounds good — see you by the door five minutes before; I’ll help round people up and lead the pledge.
Sounds great — I'll meet you by the door and help lead the pledge; thanks for taking charge.
Thanks — see you by the door; we'll make the pledge quick and clear.
Sounds great — see you by the door; thanks for leading it, I’ll help round everyone up.
Sounds great — see you by the door; thanks for helping round everyone up. I’ll lead the pledge and call out "Pineapple" if anything looks off.
Sounds good — see you at the door; I’ll help gather people and shout "Pineapple" if anything looks off.
Thanks — see you at the door; let's stick to the plan and call out "Pineapple" if anything's off.
